sentence_reviews.text: Quantized inference stores and computes weights or activations in reduced precision, trading numerical fidelity for lower memory, energy, and latency.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: GPTQ and SmoothQuant directly support post-training low-precision weights/activations for LLM inference with reduced memory/computation and accuracy tradeoffs.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for weights and activations; energy is a reasonable hardware-efficiency implication but less directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Quantized inference & compressed deployment is to connect Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation, Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion to downstream capabilities including Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment, Image generation, editing & design.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support some underlying mechanisms, but this downstream capability list is atlas graph positioning rather than a directly sourced claim.
sentence_reviews.notes: Use a narrower claim or add sources for each downstream dependency if exact verification is required.
